## Security Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded credentials
- [ ] All DB queries use prepared statements
- [ ] All user input validated and sanitised
- [ ] CSRF token verified on state-changing endpoints
- [ ] All output HTML-escaped before rendering
- [ ] Auth guards in place for protected pages
- [ ] No debug output (`var_dump`, `print_r`)
